message:
fix(obligation,record): add double-panic guards and cfg-gated Drop impls

Session-type channels and symbolic obligations previously panicked
unconditionally in Drop when leaked, which could trigger a double-panic
(and process abort) if the thread was already unwinding. Both Drop impls
now check std::thread::panicking() first and bail early.

Additionally, the session-type Chan Drop is now cfg-gated:
- debug_assertions: panics (catches leaks during development/testing)
- release: logs via tracing_compat::error! (avoids crashing production)

This makes unwinding safer in both test harnesses and production,
especially for scenarios where a panic in one task causes cascading
drops of other in-flight channels/obligations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
